stories.title: Olney: The 12 MLB execs under the most pressure at...
stories.summary: With the deadline Aug. 3, here are which front offices could make -- or break -- their future this trade season.

stories.title: Mbappé nets stunner, breaks France record in win
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé moved ahead of Lionel Messi in the all-time World Cup scoring charts and became France's record goalscorer with two goals in Les Bleus' 3-1 Group I win against Senegal.

stories.title: Pickens at Cowboys camp, OK with franchise tag
stories.summary: After skipping the voluntary part of the Cowboys' offseason program, Dallas wide receiver George Pickens worked out with the team Tuesday, the first day of mandatory minicamp, telling reporters he is prepared to play the 2026 season on the franchise tag.

stories.title: Family to have Smith's brain checked for CTE
stories.summary: The family of Aldon Smith has decided to send his brain to medical experts in Boston to see whether CTE played a role in the former NFL defensive lineman's death.

stories.title: Tortorella not returning as Golden Knights' coach
stories.summary: John Tortorella, who was hired with eight games left in the regular season and guided the Golden Knights to the Stanley Cup Final, will not return as coach next season.
